ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

LAW AND MOTION, 302, JUDGMENT DEBTOR ESCOBAR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS NOT CARRIED HER BURDEN OF SHOWING ALL OF HER EARNINGS ARE EXEMPT. (CCP 703.580.) THE SANTA CLARA COUNTY SHERRIFF'S OFFICE IS ORDERED TO RELEASE THE $487.06 TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. $150 IS ORDERED TO BE WITHHELD FROM DEBTOR'S EARNINGS PER PAY PERIOD UNTIL THE DEBT IS SATISFIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SUZANNE CROZIER, CSR # 4761 (302/MJM)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos.
Off Calendar Oct-29-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Judgment Debtor Escobar's claim of exemption is denied. Judgment Debtor has not carried her burden of showing all of her earnings are exempt. (CCP 703.580.) The Santa Clara County Sherriff's Office is ordered to release the $487.06 to Judgment Creditor Fireside Thrift Co. $150 is ordered to be withheld from Debtor's earnings per pay period until the debt is satisfied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Suzanne Crozier, CSR # 4761 =(302/MJM)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Oct-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT COMPANY's (Amended) HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is Off calendar. Duplicate entry. =(302/MJM)
